title: Shape of a Woman
lyrics: Like an old desire that you know too well

In the shape of a woman
Hurting in your soul because the lady's gone

Remember when you fell in love with the
See the violet in her eyes, body so ethereal
See me to my grave 'cause I found God (found God)
In the shape of a woman
Shape of a woman (shape of a wo-woman)
Shape of a woman (woman) (shape of a wo-woman)
See the violet in her eyes, body so ethereal
